title: [ImportVerilog] ltl.implication op types don't verify with rose in antecendent
body:
This seems to be a MWE:

```sv
module simple (
    input logic in1, in2
);

    always assert property ($rose(in1) |-> in2);
endmodule
```

This throws the error: 

```
simple.sv:5:12: error: 'ltl.implication' op operand #0 must be 1-bit signless integer or LTL sequence type, but got '!ltl.property'
    always assert property ($rose(in1) |-> in2);
           ^
simple.sv:5:12: note: see current operation: %9 = "ltl.implication"(%6, %8) : (!ltl.property, i1) -> !ltl.property
```

I guess the rose construct is generating some invalid input type for the ltl.implication op that eventually gets generated
